questions.text: Order the following 5 steps to make up a Material Determination:
options: 1- Sales order arrives in the system with the items and their codes
2- Retrieve all SKUs related to EAN
3 - Remove SKUs with closed status, not listed or excluded
4 - Sort internal codes based on active status

questions.text: _______ is: when a sales order is transmitted through the system via application and a material cannot be determined, a ‘False’ Code is populated on the line of the sales order
A product can be ordered in several ways to begin the Material Determination on the order (You may choose more than one):
MM Supersession will create SD Substitutions _________ with NEO
Order the following 3 steps for Shipping Point Determination Sequence logic on the Sales Order:
options: Manual Entry, Custom Logic, Standard Logic
Standard Logic, Custom Logic, Manual Entry
Custom Logic, Standard Logic, Manual Entry
Standard Logic, Manual Entry, Custom Logic
